reasoning: Both audits found no malicious code. Qwen's thorough source code review confirms safe desktop application behavior. PKGBUILD and install hooks show standard packaging practices.
coverage_issues: deepseek failed to review source code files (only reviewed PKGBUILD/install)
deepseek skipped critical files like setup.py which executes during build
learnings: Prioritize build/install scripts: Models should always review setup.py/configure scripts executed during makepkg
Improve path handling: Prevent models from requesting non-existent files by showing extracted source structure
Enforce critical file review: Audit tool should mandate review of build-executed scripts before declaring safe
Handle binary files better: Extract archives automatically or flag for manual review when source is critical
